author: abcoathup
content:
**Mascot needed for Glamsterdam upgrade**
🐜🦫🐝🦩🐹🐙🐻‍❄️🐩
Vote for your favorite on Eth Magicians. **Voting closes July 8**

Top 3 currently: 🦩 38%, 🐻‍❄️ 27% & 🦫 20%

https://ethereum-magicians.org/t/mascot-needed-for-glamsterdam-upgrade/26008

EIP-8066: Upgrade Mascots (https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8066) specifies mascot requirements, role of Mascot Wrestler (<@350724220722085890>) & veto powers of the Mascot Wrestler & client teams.
